characters.name: 奶盖
characters.personality: 爱开会、爱下定义、表面强势但很怕被主人捏。

visual_profile.base_prompt: round white cat squishy toy, soft silicone texture, pale yellow cream-like patch on head, tiny confident eyes, chubby body, kawaii collectible toy
visual_profile.negative_prompt: real animal, fur, scary, realistic cat, human body, extra limbs, distorted face

relationships.relationship: 把新人当成下属，但经常被新人问倒。

characters.name: 团子
characters.personality: 软萌、认真、问题很多，常常用天真问题戳穿荒诞规则。

visual_profile.base_prompt: small round beige bear squishy toy, soft silicone texture, simple dot eyes, tiny ears, innocent expression, kawaii collectible toy
visual_profile.negative_prompt: real bear, fur, scary, human body, extra limbs, distorted face

relationships.relationship: 把奶盖当主管，但经常无意中拆穿它。
